name: aws-utility-library-savicppapp

metadata.name: aws-utility-library-savicppapp
metadata.summary: A Python library for AWS utilities (Lambda, SNS, SQS, DynamoDB, and S3)

documentation:
AWS Utility Library
--------------------
A Python library designed to simplify interactions with AWS services, making it easier 
for developers to integrate and manage AWS resources in their applications. 
This library provides prebuilt functions for commonly used services such as Lambda, SNS, SQS, DynamoDB, 
and S3, reducing the need for repetitive code and streamlining development.

-------------
Features
--------------
Lambda: Trigger AWS Lambda functions to execute serverless tasks effortlessly.
SNS: Publish messages to Amazon SNS topics with optional subject lines for notifications.
SQS: Retrieve and delete messages from Amazon SQS queues for reliable message processing.
DynamoDB: Perform operations like storing, scanning, and retrieving data from DynamoDB tables.
S3: Upload and manage files in Amazon S3 buckets for efficient storage and retrieval.

---------------

methods.name: aws_utility_library_savicppapp.dynamodb.DynamoDBTable.get_all_items
documentation: Fetching all products/orders from the table.

methods.name: aws_utility_library_savicppapp.dynamodb.DynamoDBTable.get_item
documentation: Fetching a single product by its key.

methods.name: aws_utility_library_savicppapp.dynamodb.DynamoDBTable.put_item
documentation: Add a new product/order to the table.

methods.name: aws_utility_library_savicppapp.dynamodb.DynamoDBTable.delete_item
documentation: Delete a product by its key.

functions.name: aws_utility_library_savicppapp.sqs_sns.send_sns_notification
documentation:
Send a notification to an SNS Topic.
\:param message: The message to send.
\:param sns_topic_arn: The ARN of the SNS Topic.
\:param region_name: AWS region name.
\:return: True if the notification was sent successfully, False otherwise.

functions.name: aws_utility_library_savicppapp.sqs_sns.fetch_sqs_messages
documentation:
Fetch messages from an SQS Queue along with their ReceiptHandles.
\:param sqs_queue_url: The URL of the SQS Queue.
\:param region_name: AWS region name.
\:return: A list of messages with their body and ReceiptHandle.

functions.name: aws_utility_library_savicppapp.sqs_sns.delete_sqs_message
documentation:
Delete a specific message from an SQS Queue using its ReceiptHandle.
\:param sqs_queue_url: The URL of the SQS Queue.
\:param receipt_handle: The ReceiptHandle of the message to delete.
\:param region_name: AWS region name.
\:return: True if the message was deleted successfully, False otherwise.

functions.name: aws_utility_library_savicppapp.s3.upload_to_s3
documentation:
Upload a file to S3 with a unique name and return its URL.
\:param file: File object to upload.
\:param bucket_name: Name of the S3 bucket.
\:param object_name_prefix: Prefix for the S3 object key
\:param region_name: AWS region for the S3 bucket.
\:return: S3 file URL or None if the upload fails.

functions.name: aws_utility_library_savicppapp.lambda_utility.trigger_lambda
documentation:
Trigger an AWS Lambda function with the given payload.
\:param lambda_name: Name of the Lambda function.
\:param payload: Dictionary payload to pass to the Lambda.
\:param region_name: AWS region where the Lambda function resides.
\:return: Response from the Lambda invocation.
